text: This environment makes me feel as though I am standing on the threshold of thought and creation. The glass-walled room, its emptiness and clarity, suggests the transparency of inquiry, while the R+D space bathes me in the glow of innovation. Light, screens, and text create a gentle tension between genuine presence and curated experience. I feel contemplative, aware of the artificiality and intention in this space, yet soothed by its meditative quiet—a liminality between observer and participant.
